title: Define a validated register command
scenario: The application layer should receive a command type, not raw optional DTO fields. Keep command fields private and expose read-only accessors.
instructions: Define RegisterUserCommand with private email and display_name fields, a constructor, and borrowed accessors.

hints.body: Keep the Converting DTOs into domain commands code active and define RegisterUserCommand with private email and display_name fields, a constructor, and borrowed accessors.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define a validated register command is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define a validated register command now extends the active Converting DTOs into domain commands code with register command value. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
